---
description: |
  Workspace instructions for Portfolia, a React/TypeScript web application for portfolio analysis.
  Use these guidelines when editing code, writing tests, improving the UI, or updating the API.
---

# Portfolia Workspace Instructions

- Shared source of truth for role behavior and context:
  - `docs/ai/context.md`
  - `docs/ai/skills/architect.md`
  - `docs/ai/skills/developer.md`
  - `docs/ai/skills/tester.md`
- Process and completion policy:
  - `codex/process.md`
  - If behavior/API/architecture/workflow changes, update docs in the same task.
- Product overview and run commands:
  - `README.md`
